posts.text: Judge halts RFK Jr.'s hand-picked vaccine advisers from causing further damage to American kids. No doubt the administration will find a friendly appeals court to stay this decision. @_GoozNews open.substack.com/pub/goozne…

Trump's war of choice has forced health care affordability from the headlines. It gives us time to assess what ought to be the Democrats' reform plan for the mid-terms.

open.substack.com/pub/goozne…
The cost crisis beyond the ACA: No matter what Congress does about ACA subsidies, the private insurance market faces a cost crisis next year. See @_GoozNews open.substack.com/pub/goozne…
Chicago on the verge of occupation, by @_GoozNews open.substack.com/pub/goozne…
Missiles and drones, not health insurance. An accounting for the Trump regime's misplaced priorities, and comments on other stories in the news.
Judge halts RFK Jr.'s hand-picked vaccine advisers. Cites panel's failure to follow federal law or science in scrapping long-standing vaccine recommendations.

Can prior authorization be fixed? Should it be?. Controlling health care costs depends on eliminating unnecessary, low-value care. But insurers have an inherent conflict of interest and shouldn't be running prior authorization.
A health care plan for the mid-terms. If I were running for office this fall, here’s what I’d say: Protect families first.
Time to rethink health care reform. Trump’s undeclared war in the Middle East postpones the much-needed debate over health care affordability – the #1 issue bedeviling average Americans.
Reform on ice. Trump’s undeclared war in the Middle East postpones the much-needed debate over health care affordability – the #1 issue bedeviling average Americans.

Podcast: Exceptional caring. Dr. Hoangmai Pham wants better care for America's intellectually and developmentally disabled. Her journey from child refugee to physician leader is the subject of her new memoir: Bridges from Saigon.
The stock market and TrumpRx. Trump's SOTU address will tout his big wins on lowering drug prices. Don't believe it.
Data on immigrants seeking ER care shared with ICE. A recent court ruling allowing data sharing will cause undocumented workers to avoid care when seriously injured or ill.
A year spent degrading health. People will die, more will get sick, and many will forgo care because of the Trump administration's assaults on public health over the past year.

Podcast: The Pain Brokers . The courts are supposed to help patients harmed by faulty medical products. Author Elizabeth Burch exposes how legal con men, rogue doctors and their financiers made things worse for patients.
Fraud fight rule #1: Go after the big fish. The DOJ crackdown on fraud at Somali-run social service organizations ignores the biggest alleged fraud scheme based in Minnesota.

The GOP v. kids. The Trump administration is waging war against programs that offer child care, health care and education to the nation's children. Working class Americans will pay the steepest price.
Trump's concepts of a non-plan. The so-called Great Health Care Plan would do next to nothing to lower overall costs or premiums paid by individuals, families and employers.

Advisors to new nutrition guidelines rife with conflicts of interest. When RFK, Jr. dismissed the old advisors, he cited their corporate ties. Their replacements took cash from the National Cattlemen Beef Association and National Dairy Council, among others.
